subject: FW:
body:
From: Sean J. Lancaster [mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com] 
Sent: Monday, January 07, 2008 12:06 PM
To: lvjet@aol.com
Cc: Lesley Groff
Subject: 
Sensitivity: Confidential

 

Monday, January 07, 2008

 

Larry thanks for the call today I wanted to send you an update on the
Sikorsky S76C++ and Boeing 727-100 marketing.  

 

Sikorsky S76C++

 

To date we have send out the full marketing material packages to 30
parties.  We have two potentially real prospects at the moment both of
whom are telling me they plan on inspecting the aircraft within coming
weeks.  The market remains strong the helicopter we are beginning to get
calls from overseas now as well which represents the majority of the
sales of fixed wing aircraft now.  We continue to get many calls on the
aircraft and while we get come push back on the pricing most reasonable
people agree the pricing is within market. 

 

Boeing 727-100 Valsan

 

To date we have sent our full marketing packages to 19 parties.  This
market is slower although we do continue to get inquiries mostly from
North and Southern Africa. 

 

Larry be assured we are working on moving both aircraft as quickly as
possible at the best prices the market will bear. 

 

Best regards 

 

 

Sean J. Lancaster

Bristol Associates Inc.

1-540-665-5135 direct

1-202-682-4000 ext 1130 Main Office

1-540-533-8183 Mobile

1-540-301-0050 FAX

slancaster@bristolassociates.com
<mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com> 

www.bristolassociates.com <http://www.bristolassociates.com>  

 

This message may contain confidential and/or legally privileged
information.  If you are not the intended recipient of the message,
please destroy it. Any unauthorized dissemination, distribution or
copying of the material in this message, and any attachments to the
message, is strictly forbidden. (c) 2007 all rights reserved.

From: Sean J. Lancaster [mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com]
Sent: Monday, January 07, 2008 12:06 PM
To: lvjet@aol.com
Cc: Lesley Groff
Subject:
Sensitivity: Confidential

 

Monday, January 07, 2008

 

Larry thanks for the call today I wanted to send you an update on the Sikorsky S76C++ and Boeing 727-100 marketing. 

 

Sikorsky S76C++

 

To date we have send out the full marketing material packages to 30 parties.  We have two potentially real prospects at the moment both of whom are telling me they plan on inspecting the aircraft within coming weeks.  The market remains strong the helicopter we are beginning to get calls from overseas now as well which represents the majority of the sales of fixed wing aircraft now.  We continue to get many calls on the aircraft and while we get come push back on the pricing most reasonable people agree the pricing is within market.

 

Boeing 727-100 Valsan

 

To date we have sent our full marketing packages to 19 parties.  This market is slower although we do continue to get inquiries mostly from North and Southern Africa.

 

Larry be assured we are working on moving both aircraft as quickly as possible at the best prices the market will bear.

 

Best regards

 

 

Sean J. Lancaster

Bristol Associates Inc.
